tracks.name: Launch Readiness
tracks.description: Top-10 P0/P1 launch blockers. Closing these moves the org product from 'looks finished, partially is' to 'actually launchable to first paying orgs.'

tracks.name: Comms Infrastructure Completion
tracks.description: Close the 23-stub inventory items in email/SMS/calling. ses-proxy Lambda deploy, plaintext multipart, List-Unsubscribe on Convex path, soft-bounce categorization, custom domain + DKIM, A/B winner picker, SMS dispatch, template library, A2P 10DLC, MMS, tracking attribution.

tracks.name: Reach Extension
tracks.description: State + local + special district officeholder data; CA/GB/AU rep-lookup wiring; mainnet DistrictRegistry; multi-jurisdiction routing at campaign layer; TIGER 2026 monitoring + DOGE/Census resilience; postal bubble disambiguation; per-district feed infrastructure.
tracks.total_effort_days: 9-12 months full closure (state-leg via OpenStates is 2 weeks; international country lookup is 3 days each after hydration; mainnet contracts 1-2 weeks; multi-jurisdiction routing 4 weeks)

tracks.name: Agentic Systems Realization
tracks.description: Delegation executor (FEATURES.DELEGATION=false, Convex CRUD complete); ZK proof attached to AI-assisted actions; per-supporter bill alerts; agentic legislative monitoring; cross-org agent action portability; agent-as-civic-actor pricing; message-writer proof attachment; agent trace observability extension; delegation UI; coordinated multi-agent flows.

tracks.name: Quality Signaling Completion
tracks.description: Auto-debate-spawn from campaign threshold; on-chain stake verification (Convex currently caps at $1); TEE Nitro Enclave deployment; TEE-attested AI panel execution; mainnet DebateMarket; debate→tier promotion; position privacy UX; LMSR live price feed UI; org-side debate signal surfacing; debate signal composed into verification packet.
tracks.total_effort_days: 8-12 weeks elapsed (mainnet 1-2 weeks; TEE 2-3 weeks; TEE AI panel +3-4 weeks; code items 2-3 weeks)

tracks.name: Accountability Anchoring
tracks.description: Receipt Merkle anchoring pipeline; mainnet SnapshotAnchor; anchoring cadence; constituent-side receipt access; receipt API for orgs; state-bill ingestion; browser-based receipt verification UI; scorecard methodology versioning; receipt response auto-detection; long-term archive.

tracks.name: Composability Surfaces
tracks.description: Coalition aggregation API (currently 501); shared supporter pools (commitment-based); cross-org reputation portability; cross-border campaign schema; coalition packet computation; coalition campaign delivery; white-label/per-org branding; child org hierarchy; network-level rate limits + quota aggregation; cross-org reputation Merkle tree decision.

tracks.name: Reader-Side Product
tracks.description: Reader dashboard for staffers; /v/[hash] page enhancements; in-browser attestation verification UI; independent campaign report URL; CRM integration story (Indigov class); long-term-survivable artifact pattern; per-DM public profile enhancements; reader-side notification API; aggregate weekly digest; privacy model.

tracks.name: Developer Platform
tracks.description: TypeScript SDK npm publish; Python SDK PyPI publish; outbound webhooks (CHOKEPOINT); OSDI compliance (separate /api/osdi/v1/ namespace); audit log API; activity feed v1; real-time subscriptions v1; Building on Commons developer portal; rate limit policy reconciliation; embed widget enhancements.

tracks.name: Tier System + Structural Cleanup
tracks.description: reputationTier writer post-signup; engagementTier server-side cross-check; tierMap key mismatch fix; CAI grounded in real engagement; MDL_MDOC flag flip post-I1; member removal + role change mutations; custom fields type system; audit log for org actions; atlasVersion per campaignAction; engagement tier histogram rendered; Stripe trialing as active.
